name: RenderingOptionsObserver
summary: This class is abstract. To implement this observer, create a Ruby class of this type, implement the desired methods, and add an instance of the observer to the objects of interests. This observer interface is implemented to react to rendering options events.

methods.name: onRenderingOptionsChanged
methods.summary: The onRenderingOptionsChanged method is invoked whenever the user changes their rendering options.
methods.remarks: The onRenderingOptionsChanged method is invoked whenever the user changes their rendering options.

params.name: type
params.doc: A number indicating which option was changed represented by one of the constants defined in Sketchup::RenderingOptions.
